calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Release Of Property From Lien
Off Calendar Jun-28-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Douglas Akay, Esq., 415-764-1999, appearing for Arkady Berger,Plaintiff and moving party

No other appearances.

ARGUED. Mr. Akay stated that he contested the tentative ruling. The Court replied that the amount awarded stated in the tentative was a typo and that the Court intended to award $3,600.00 in fees. The Court asked what is the status of the property. Mr. Akay responded that his client has been unable to build on his property for a year and half and that he recently hired a contractor to lay the foundation.
The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONER ARKADY BERGER, NELLY MERZHERITSKY Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Release Of Property From Lien is taken under submission. Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not Reported, D501.
